message:
Fix memory leaks and improve external package import system

Memory leak fixes:
- Add Parser.deinit() to free allocated_strings (string concatenation)
- Add defer p.deinit() to all Parser.init() call sites
- Free type_annotation and return_type in AST function_def/lambda deinit
- Fix import_resolver compiled path check to free both paths properly
- Fix visited hashmap to always dupe keys so they can be freed

External package improvements:
- Handle absolute paths in analyzePackage (site-packages)
- Skip relative imports in from_imports codegen (internal to packages)
- Skip builtin modules (__future__, typing) in from_imports
- Proper module naming for packages (flask/__init__.py -> flask.zig)

Simple files now compile with no memory leaks. Flask compilation
works but external module parsing still has some leak paths.
